# AppClipHeaderImage.Attributes

**Object**

The attributes that describe the image that appears on the App Clip card of a default App Clip experience.

## Declaration

```swift
object AppClipHeaderImage.Attributes
```

## Objects

- **AppClipHeaderImage.Relationships**: The relationships of the App Clip Header Images resource you included in the request and those on which you can operate.

items.description: The relationships of the App Clip Header Images resource you included in the request and those on which you can operate.
